Agent B annotates the document with corrections and forwards it to Agent C for approval.
Agent C verifies the changes, signs the document digitally, and sends it to a secure server.
The original draft disappears from the shared drive after the signed version is archived.
All agents receive a notification confirming the document's final status and removal from circulation.
